Description: Unique, sequential ID representing a response to a survey question
Identifies whether a response was complete or incomplete
Survey respondent's job department (Human Resources, Public Works, etc.)
Binary (0/1) field indicating if the respondent is in a Director role
Binary (0/1) field indicating if the respondent is in a Manager role
Binary (0/1) field indicating if the respondent is in a Supervisor role
Binary (0/1) field indicating if the respondent is in a Staff role
